words.example_sentence: SSM combines Spring, Spring MVC, and MyBatis in a traditional Java web stack.
words.example_sentence_cn: SSM 是 Spring、Spring MVC 和 MyBatis 的传统 Java Web 技术组合。

words.example_sentence: Spring Framework provides dependency management, AOP, transactions, and web support.
words.example_sentence_cn: Spring Framework 提供依赖管理、AOP、事务和 Web 支持。

words.example_sentence: Spring IoC creates objects and wires their dependencies.
words.example_sentence_cn: Spring IoC 创建对象并装配它们的依赖。

words.example_sentence: The IoC container manages bean creation, configuration, and lifecycle.
words.example_sentence_cn: IoC 容器管理 Bean 的创建、配置和生命周期。

words.example_sentence: Inversion of control moves object creation from application code to the container.
words.example_sentence_cn: 控制反转把对象创建职责从业务代码交给容器。
words.code_snippet: // the container constructs UserService  // inversion of control

words.example_sentence: Constructor injection makes required dependencies explicit and testable.
words.example_sentence_cn: 构造器注入让必需依赖更明确，也更容易测试。

words.example_sentence: Setter injection supplies an optional dependency through a setter method.
words.example_sentence_cn: Setter 注入通过 setter 方法提供可选依赖。
words.code_snippet: public void setUserMapper(UserMapper userMapper) { this.userMapper = userMapper; }

words.example_sentence: ApplicationContext is Spring's main interface for accessing managed beans.
words.example_sentence_cn: ApplicationContext 是访问 Spring 托管 Bean 的主要接口。

words.example_sentence: BeanFactory is the basic Spring container interface.
words.example_sentence_cn: BeanFactory 是 Spring 容器的基础接口。

words.example_sentence: A Spring bean is an object created and managed by the Spring container.
words.example_sentence_cn: Spring Bean 是由 Spring 容器创建和管理的对象。

words.example_sentence: Bean scope controls how many bean instances Spring creates.
words.example_sentence_cn: Bean 作用域控制 Spring 创建多少个 Bean 实例。

words.example_sentence: Singleton scope creates one bean instance per Spring container.
words.example_sentence_cn: 单例作用域在每个 Spring 容器中创建一个 Bean 实例。

words.example_sentence: Prototype scope creates a new bean each time it is requested.
words.example_sentence_cn: 原型作用域在每次获取时创建新的 Bean。

words.example_sentence: Component scanning discovers annotated classes and registers them as beans.
words.example_sentence_cn: 组件扫描会发现带注解的类并把它们注册为 Bean。

words.example_sentence: The @Component annotation marks a class for component scanning.
words.example_sentence_cn: @Component 注解把类标记为可被组件扫描发现。

words.example_sentence: The @Service annotation marks a service-layer component.
words.example_sentence_cn: @Service 注解用于标记业务层组件。

words.example_sentence: The @Repository annotation marks a data-access component.
words.example_sentence_cn: @Repository 注解用于标记数据访问层组件。

words.example_sentence: The @Controller annotation marks a Spring MVC controller.
words.example_sentence_cn: @Controller 注解用于标记 Spring MVC 控制器。

words.example_sentence: The @Autowired annotation asks Spring to resolve a dependency by type.
words.example_sentence_cn: @Autowired 注解让 Spring 按类型解析依赖。

words.example_sentence: The @Qualifier annotation selects one bean when multiple candidates share a type.
words.example_sentence_cn: 同一类型存在多个 Bean 时，@Qualifier 用于指定其中一个。

words.example_sentence: The @Resource annotation commonly injects a dependency by name.
words.example_sentence_cn: @Resource 注解通常按名称注入依赖。

words.example_sentence: AOP applies cross-cutting behavior such as logging or transactions around methods.
words.example_sentence_cn: AOP 在方法周围应用日志、事务等横切逻辑。

words.example_sentence: An aspect groups advice and pointcut rules.
words.example_sentence_cn: 切面把通知逻辑和切点规则组织在一起。

words.example_sentence: Advice is the code executed before, after, or around a matched method.
words.example_sentence_cn: 通知是在匹配方法之前、之后或周围执行的代码。

words.example_sentence: A pointcut selects the methods where advice should run.
words.example_sentence_cn: 切点选择通知应该在哪些方法上执行。

words.example_sentence: In Spring AOP, a join point represents a method execution.
words.example_sentence_cn: 在 Spring AOP 中，连接点表示一次方法执行。

words.example_sentence: Spring often applies AOP behavior through a proxy object.
words.example_sentence_cn: Spring 通常通过代理对象应用 AOP 行为。

words.example_sentence: Transaction management keeps related database operations atomic.
words.example_sentence_cn: 事务管理保证相关数据库操作具有原子性。

words.example_sentence: The @Transactional annotation defines a transactional method or class.
words.example_sentence_cn: @Transactional 注解把方法或类声明为事务边界。
words.code_snippet:
@Transactional
public void transfer(long from, long to, BigDecimal amount) { }

words.example_sentence: Spring MVC routes HTTP requests to controller methods.
words.example_sentence_cn: Spring MVC 把 HTTP 请求路由到控制器方法。

words.example_sentence: DispatcherServlet is the front controller of Spring MVC.
words.example_sentence_cn: DispatcherServlet 是 Spring MVC 的前端控制器。

words.example_sentence: HandlerMapping finds the controller method for an incoming request.
words.example_sentence_cn: HandlerMapping 为传入请求查找对应的控制器方法。

words.example_sentence: HandlerAdapter invokes different kinds of Spring MVC handlers.
words.example_sentence_cn: HandlerAdapter 负责调用不同类型的 Spring MVC 处理器。

words.example_sentence: ViewResolver converts a logical view name into a concrete view.
words.example_sentence_cn: ViewResolver 把逻辑视图名解析成具体视图。

words.example_sentence: ModelAndView carries model data and a view name together.
words.example_sentence_cn: ModelAndView 同时携带模型数据和视图名称。

words.example_sentence: The @RequestMapping annotation maps paths and HTTP methods to controllers.
words.example_sentence_cn: @RequestMapping 注解把路径和 HTTP 方法映射到控制器。

words.example_sentence: The @GetMapping annotation maps an HTTP GET request.
words.example_sentence_cn: @GetMapping 注解用于映射 HTTP GET 请求。

words.example_sentence: The @PostMapping annotation maps an HTTP POST request.
words.example_sentence_cn: @PostMapping 注解用于映射 HTTP POST 请求。

words.example_sentence: The @RequestParam annotation binds a query or form parameter.
words.example_sentence_cn: @RequestParam 注解绑定查询参数或表单参数。

words.example_sentence: The @PathVariable annotation binds a value from the URL path.
words.example_sentence_cn: @PathVariable 注解绑定 URL 路径中的值。

words.example_sentence: The @RequestBody annotation deserializes the request body into an object.
words.example_sentence_cn: @RequestBody 注解把请求体反序列化为对象。

words.example_sentence: The @ResponseBody annotation writes a return value to the HTTP response body.
words.example_sentence_cn: @ResponseBody 注解把返回值写入 HTTP 响应体。

words.example_sentence: The @RestController annotation combines @Controller and @ResponseBody.
words.example_sentence_cn: @RestController 是 @Controller 与 @ResponseBody 的组合注解。

words.example_sentence: MyBatis maps Java methods and objects to SQL statements and result sets.
words.example_sentence_cn: MyBatis 把 Java 方法和对象映射到 SQL 语句与结果集。

words.example_sentence: SqlSession executes mapped statements and manages a database session.
words.example_sentence_cn: SqlSession 执行映射语句并管理数据库会话。

words.example_sentence: SqlSessionFactory creates SqlSession instances.
words.example_sentence_cn: SqlSessionFactory 用于创建 SqlSession 实例。

words.example_sentence: A mapper interface declares database operations as Java methods.
words.example_sentence_cn: Mapper 接口把数据库操作声明为 Java 方法。
words.code_snippet: public interface UserMapper { User findById(long id); }

words.example_sentence: Mapper XML stores SQL statements and mapping rules outside Java code.
words.example_sentence_cn: Mapper XML 在 Java 代码之外保存 SQL 和映射规则。

words.example_sentence: A resultMap maps database columns to object properties.
words.example_sentence_cn: resultMap 把数据库列映射到对象属性。

words.example_sentence: Dynamic SQL builds different SQL fragments from runtime conditions.
words.example_sentence_cn: 动态 SQL 根据运行时条件组合不同 SQL 片段。

words.example_sentence: The parameterType attribute documents the input type of a mapped statement.
words.example_sentence_cn: parameterType 属性描述映射语句的输入类型。

words.example_sentence: The resultType attribute specifies the Java type returned by a mapped statement.
words.example_sentence_cn: resultType 属性指定映射语句返回的 Java 类型。

words.example_sentence: The #{} placeholder binds a value through a prepared statement.
words.example_sentence_cn: #{} 占位符通过预编译语句安全绑定参数值。

words.example_sentence: The ${} syntax performs raw string substitution and must not receive untrusted input.
words.example_sentence_cn: ${} 会直接进行字符串替换，不能接收不可信输入。
words.code_snippet: ORDER BY ${column}  // whitelist column before substitution

words.example_sentence: The @Mapper annotation marks an interface for MyBatis mapper registration.
words.example_sentence_cn: @Mapper 注解把接口标记为 MyBatis Mapper。

words.example_sentence: The @Select annotation places a SELECT statement on a mapper method.
words.example_sentence_cn: @Select 注解把 SELECT 语句写在 Mapper 方法上。
words.code_snippet:
@Select("SELECT * FROM users WHERE id = #{id}")
User findById(long id);

words.example_sentence: The @Insert annotation places an INSERT statement on a mapper method.
words.example_sentence_cn: @Insert 注解把 INSERT 语句写在 Mapper 方法上。
words.code_snippet:
@Insert("INSERT INTO users(name) VALUES(#{name})")
int add(User user);

words.example_sentence: The @Update annotation places an UPDATE statement on a mapper method.
words.example_sentence_cn: @Update 注解把 UPDATE 语句写在 Mapper 方法上。
words.code_snippet:
@Update("UPDATE users SET name = #{name} WHERE id = #{id}")
int save(User user);

words.example_sentence: The @Delete annotation places a DELETE statement on a mapper method.
words.example_sentence_cn: @Delete 注解把 DELETE 语句写在 Mapper 方法上。
words.code_snippet:
@Delete("DELETE FROM users WHERE id = #{id}")
int remove(long id);

words.example_sentence: MyBatis-Spring connects mapper interfaces, sessions, and transactions to Spring.
words.example_sentence_cn: MyBatis-Spring 把 Mapper、会话和事务接入 Spring。
